overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing characters walking through a dense futuristic metropolis with towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and holographic billboards. The clip follows pedestrians navigating narrow sidewalks and crossing busy intersections in a cyberpunk city bathed in bright morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban sidewalk beside graffiti-covered concrete wall

agents.ego_description: following a character wearing a black shirt with a topknot hairstyle walking steadily along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: character with black shirt and topknot walking ahead at steady pace
pedestrian in red top walking in opposite direction toward camera

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art running parallel to sidewalk
massive elevated highway or metro track structure spanning across the street ahead
large digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
metal ventilation grates embedded in the concrete sidewalk surface

segments.scene_description: The segment follows a character with a distinctive topknot hairstyle walking along a narrow urban sidewalk bordered by a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the left and a busy street on the right. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective as they approach an intersection, with elevated metro tracks visible in the distance against the bright morning sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with marked crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk into wide open intersection with multiple crosswalks
begins crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass through intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating across the intersection, following a bald character in a blue sleeveless vest with 'Tom's Diner' logo

notable_agents.action: bald character wearing blue sleeveless shirt and diner vest crossing the street ahead
blue sports car driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: wide marked pedestrian crosswalk with yellow grid lines painted on asphalt
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals at intersection corner
low concrete dividers separating the crosswalk from vehicle lanes
tall building with red facade and large signage reading 'CONB' in white letters

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit intersection as the camera turns right from the sidewalk. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk alongside a bald man in a blue vest, navigating between moving vehicles including a blue sports car. Tall buildings with digital signage surround the intersection, and elevated metro tracks are visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined commercial sidewalk with mixed modern architecture

events.description: completes crossing and enters tree-lined sidewalk on opposite side of intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk following the bald character past street trees and storefronts

notable_agents.action: bald character in blue vest walking steadily ahead along the tree-lined path
woman in light clothing walking in same direction on the right side of sidewalk

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees planted along the sidewalk providing partial shade
multi-story building facade covered with large advertisements and corporate signage
tall modern glass and steel tower rising in the distance with reflective windows
modern street lamp with orange accent lighting mounted on black pole

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character proceeds along a tree-lined sidewalk with mature trees on the right casting dappled shadows. The environment features commercial buildings with large billboards on the left and a distant glass skyscraper visible ahead. The bald character in the blue vest continues walking forward as the camera follows through this shaded urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban corridor that transitions from a narrow graffiti-lined alley into a wide, sun-drenched intersection and finally into a shaded commercial district. It begins by following a character with a distinctive topknot along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a concrete wall, moving steadily toward a bright morning horizon where elevated metro tracks loom. As the character reaches the corner, the camera turns right to open into a vast intersection, tracking them and a man in a blue vest as they navigate across the asphalt amidst moving vehicles and towering digital signage. The scene then shifts from the open glare of the crossing into a more sheltered urban corridor, where the camera follows the pair along a sidewalk lined with mature trees that cast dappled shadows. Finally, the perspective pushes forward past large commercial billboards toward a distant glass skyscraper under the clear morning sky.
